rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (Nørrebro, Frederiksberg); DKK 12,000-18,000/mo center (~$1,700-2,500); non-central ~DKK 10,000

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; Danish heating costs; internet ~DKK 250/mo

diningOut.note: Copenhagen very expensive for dining; lunch ~DKK 120-150, dinner DKK 200-350

transit.note: Copenhagen metro/bus monthly pass ~DKK 790 (~$115); bikeable city

misc.note: gym (~DKK 300), toiletries, entertainment, design culture buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Copenhagen medium-term furnished lets are stable year-round.

evidence.claim: Copenhagen solo digital nomad monthly budget
evidence.quote: digital nomads should plan for approximately $4,506/month in Copenhagen, covering coworking, accommodation, food, and local transport
Rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city center averages DKK 12,000–18,000 per month, which translates to approximately $2,000/month
Groceries for a single person average 2,500–3,800 DKK per month (roughly $425)
a comfortable solo lifestyle costs approximately $2,745-4,392/month for a single person, covering housing in the city center, groceries, healthcare, utilities, and transport
